page_content:
Corequisite: MATH241.

Recommended: PHYS261 and PHYS260.

Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Mechanical Engineering department. Cross-listed with ENMA300.

Credit Only Granted for. ENMA300 or ENME382.

ENME392 Statistical Methods for Product and Processes Development (3 Credits)

Integrated statistical methodology for the improvement of products

and processes in terms of performance, quality and cost. Designed experimentation. Statistical process control. Software application. Laboratory activities.
